violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Thermometers have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

3-door deli reach-in is not in good repair. It has been placed out of service with a sign. Service call has been placed. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelf of the 2-door reach-in (back storage room) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. This area must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The dumpster area observed to have an accumulation of unused/broken items (around the dumpster). Dumpster enclosures must remain clean to prevent harborage areas for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Back storage room is overstocked. U-boats are full and there is no spacing between/around them to be able to observe pest activity. Storage rooms must have spacing around product away from walls with ample space between/around pallets/u-boats to be able to properly inspect for pest activity. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front vestibule, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The enclosure for the dumpster was observed to have unnecessary litter and other debris. Enclosures shall be maintained so that harborage conditions for pests are minimized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
